text:
Owner-curated X-POLE A-FRAME resource
The supplied directory recommends the X-POLE A-FRAME as a semi-permanent suspension-frame resource and gives this product page: https://xpoleus.com/shop-all/aerial/a-frame/xpole-a-frame/.
The official manual lists a selectable height range from 2,255 to 3,480 millimetres (89 to 137 inches, or about 7.5 to 11.42 feet). At those endpoints, the manual lists required floor areas of 3.6 and 8.9 square metres (38 and 95 square feet), respectively.
title: Owner-curated X-POLE A-FRAME resource
